email.title: Email
email.description: Change the email address for your account.
email.confirmHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to <bold>{{email}}</bold>, or click the link in that email.

toast.codeSent: We sent a confirmation code to your new email. Check the backend console (dev).
toast.rateLimited: Please wait before requesting another change.
toast.requestError: Could not start the email change.

landing.title: Landing screen
landing.description: Where you land right after signing in.
landing.label: Default screen

toast.error: Could not update the landing screen.
